title: Rouse Frets White Goss Gentile Rhodes ransomware incident

victim.name: Rouse Frets White Goss Gentile Rhodes

extortion.description: On September 30, 2018, the law firms of Rouse Frets Gentile Rhodes, LLC and White Goss, P.C. merged and became Rouse Frets White Goss Gentile Rhodes, P.C.We are ready to upload 87gb of corporate documents such as: detailed personal information clients and employees (SSNs, passports, driver licenses, addresses, phones, emails and so on), lots of confidential legal documents, court hearings, police reports, etc.
